_comment: Spec §6.2 VolumeEquation records for the PNW starter set. Bruce DF and Chambers-Foltz WH are the canonical coastal-PNW total cubic-volume forms commonly referenced in USFS/BLM cruising literature. The coefficients below are PLACEHOLDERS pending verification against a primary source — see Phase 0 open questions. Callers that need production cruise numbers must replace them before use.

equations.sourceCitation: PLACEHOLDER — Bruce & DeMars / Flewelling & McFadden coastal PNW DF CVTS form; coefficients to be verified against primary source.
PLACEHOLDER — Chambers & Foltz (1979) western hemlock total cubic volume; coefficients to be verified.
PLACEHOLDER — generic SI Schumacher-Hall parameters for western redcedar; not from a published source. Replace before any production cruise.
PLACEHOLDER — generic SI Schumacher-Hall parameters for red alder; not from a published source. Replace before any production cruise.
